host.label: Bind host
host.description: Address the dev server listens on. Use 0.0.0.0 inside Docker/Podman containers so port mappings work.

port.label: Dev server port
port.description: Port your Vite dev server runs on. The inspect UI is always at /__inspect/ on the same port.

package_manager.label: Package manager
package_manager.description: Controls which install and run commands are shown.
